title: Netflix Content Analysis
description: Explored content trends and regional preferences using real-world datasets.
shortDesc: Explored content trends and regional preferences using real-world datasets.
problem: Understanding Netflix content distribution and regional preferences to identify content gaps and opportunities.
solution: Analyzed Netflix dataset containing movies and TV shows across different countries to visualize content trends, genre distributions, and release patterns.
insights: Dramas and Comedies dominate the content library (45% combined)
Content production has increased by 300% since 2015
International content represents 40% of total library
learnings: Mastered the art of storytelling through data visualization — learned that the right chart type matters more than fancy styling.

title: Customer Churn Analysis
description: Analyzed telecom customer behavior to identify factors contributing to customer churn.
shortDesc: Identified key drivers behind customer churn using exploratory data analysis.
problem: Telecom companies lose revenue when customers discontinue services. Understanding churn patterns is essential for retention strategies.
solution: Performed exploratory data analysis on telecom customer data to uncover relationships between churn and factors such as contract type, monthly charges, tenure, and payment methods.
insights: Month-to-month contract customers showed the highest churn rate
Customers with shorter tenure were more likely to leave
Electronic check users had significantly higher churn
Higher monthly charges correlated with increased churn risk
learnings: Learned how business metrics and customer behavior data can be transformed into actionable retention strategies using data analysis.

title: Hospital Data Analysis
description: Analyzed patient admission and treatment data to identify healthcare trends and operational insights.
shortDesc: Explored hospital operations, patient demographics, and treatment patterns.
problem: Hospitals generate large volumes of patient data but often struggle to identify trends affecting operational efficiency and patient care.
solution: Conducted exploratory analysis on hospital records to study patient demographics, admission trends, department workload, and treatment outcomes.
insights: Emergency department handled over 35% of total admissions
Patients aged 50+ accounted for the highest hospitalization rate
Cardiology and General Medicine had the largest patient volume
Average length of stay increased during peak admission months
learnings: Developed experience in healthcare analytics and learned how operational data can support resource planning and decision-making.

title: Superstore Sales Analysis
description: Performed exploratory data analysis on retail sales data to uncover revenue and profit trends.
shortDesc: Analyzed sales, profit, and customer segments using Superstore dataset.
problem: Retail businesses need to understand sales performance, profitability, and customer behavior to improve decision-making.
solution: Analyzed Superstore sales data to identify top-performing categories, regional trends, customer segments, and profit drivers.
insights: Technology category generated the highest profit
West region recorded the strongest overall sales
Consumer segment contributed the largest share of revenue
Several high-sales products generated negative profit due to discounts
learnings: Strengthened business analytics skills by converting raw retail data into meaningful business recommendations and performance insights.

title: COVID-19 Data Analysis
description: Analyzed global COVID-19 trends to understand infection patterns, recovery rates, and regional impact.
shortDesc: Explored COVID-19 cases, deaths, and recovery trends using real-world pandemic data.
problem: Governments and healthcare organizations needed data-driven insights to monitor the spread of COVID-19 and allocate resources effectively.
solution: Performed exploratory data analysis on global COVID-19 datasets to visualize case growth, mortality rates, recovery trends, and country-wise impact during different phases of the pandemic.
insights: United States, India, and Brazil reported the highest cumulative case counts
Global recovery rates improved significantly after vaccine rollouts
Case spikes occurred in multiple waves across different regions
Mortality rates varied considerably between countries
Vaccination campaigns contributed to reduced hospitalization and fatality trends
learnings: Learned how to work with large-scale time-series datasets, analyze public health trends, and communicate findings through dashboards and visualizations.
